title: hostpanel-nodejs deploy manifest
description: Contract for manifest.json at the root of a deploy tarball. Produced by the deploy-actions workflow, validated by the deploy ingest endpoint. schema is versioned from day one; unknown versions are rejected with 400.

schema.description: Manifest schema version. Bump on any breaking change.

app_id.description: The HostPanel nodejs app id (nodejs_apps.id). Authoritative: must equal the app_id in the request path or the deploy is rejected with 409.

runtime.description: Node.js runtime the artifact was built for. Must match a runtime bundled by this package.

entrypoint.description: Relative path of the app entry file inside the release, e.g. server.js.

health.description: HTTP path polled on 127.0.0.1:<app.port> after restart to decide healthy vs rollback.

commit.description: Git commit SHA the artifact was built from. Its short form names the release directory.

built_at.description: UTC build timestamp set by the workflow.
